Minimal onCreate implementation with future-proofing comments
Serves as application-level dependency injection container

patterns_discovered.description: Multiple --add-opens JVM flags required in both gradle.properties and build.gradle.kts to allow KAPT access to javac internal modules
patterns_discovered.impact: Critical for build success with Java 17 and annotation processors

patterns_discovered.description: Set kotlin.compiler.execution.strategy=in-process to ensure Kotlin compiler inherits Gradle daemon JVM arguments
patterns_discovered.impact: Ensures JVM flags are properly propagated to the Kotlin compiler

patterns_discovered.description: @HiltAndroidApp annotation on Application class with minimal onCreate implementation
patterns_discovered.impact: Enables dependency injection throughout the application

patterns_discovered.description: Backup and data extraction rules configured to exclude scanner preferences from cloud synchronization
patterns_discovered.impact: Protects device-specific and sensitive configuration data

patterns_discovered.description: Coordinated updates across Android Gradle Plugin (8.2→8.3), Kotlin (1.9.20→1.9.22), and Gradle wrapper (8.2→8.4)
patterns_discovered.impact: Ensures compatibility and access to latest features

gotchas_discovered.description: KAPT (Kotlin Annotation Processing Tool) cannot access javac internal modules in Java 17+ without explicit JVM flags
gotchas_discovered.solution: Add --add-opens flags for all required javac modules in both gradle.properties and build.gradle.kts
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Document Java 17+ compatibility requirements; consider using a shared Gradle include for these flags

gotchas_discovered.description: kapt.use.worker.api=true can cause issues with in-process compilation strategy and module access
gotchas_discovered.solution: Set kapt.use.worker.api=false to force main process compilation
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Verify KAPT settings when updating Gradle or Kotlin versions

gotchas_discovered.issue: Compiler Strategy Not Inherited by Child Processes
gotchas_discovered.description: Without kotlin.compiler.execution.strategy=in-process, the Kotlin compiler runs in a separate process and doesn't inherit JVM arguments
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Include this setting in project initialization checklist

gotchas_discovered.description: local.properties contains hardcoded Windows SDK path (C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk)
gotchas_discovered.solution: Keep local.properties in .gitignore; developers should generate locally
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Document local.properties setup; ensure it's in .gitignore

gotchas_discovered.description: AndroidManifest.xml has MainActivity commented pending Phase 6, reducing immediate testability
gotchas_discovered.solution: Create placeholder MainActivity with launch intent filter for testing
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Consider creating a stub activity early for integration testing

achievements: Created Hilt-enabled Application class with proper structure and documentation
Configured AndroidManifest with required permissions for barcode scanner hardware
Resolved Java 17 KAPT compatibility issues through comprehensive JVM argument configuration
Set up backup and data extraction rules for privacy compliance (Android 12+)
Created resource files (strings, themes, icons, backup rules)
Updated all build tooling to compatible versions (Android Gradle 8.3, Kotlin 1.9.22, Gradle 8.4)
Configured Kapt settings for reliable annotation processing
challenges_overcome: Java 17 module access restrictions requiring JVM flags in multiple locations
KAPT configuration tuning for proper compilation strategy
Version compatibility alignment across build system and toolchains

recommendations.recommendation: Document Java 17+ KAPT configuration requirements in project README or wiki
recommendations.rationale: This is a common pain point when upgrading to newer Java versions; developers should be aware upfront

recommendations.recommendation: Extract Java 17 JVM flags into a reusable shared Gradle script (e.g., gradle/java17-compat.gradle.kts)
recommendations.rationale: Reduces duplication between gradle.properties and build.gradle.kts; easier to maintain and update

recommendations.recommendation: Create a placeholder MainActivity with LAUNCHER intent filter for early integration testing
recommendations.rationale: Current commented-out activity prevents app from launching; would benefit testing of Hilt DI and basic structure

recommendations.recommendation: Document backup_rules.xml and data_extraction_rules.xml configuration strategy for future sensitive data fields
recommendations.rationale: Establishes pattern for protecting device-specific and user settings from cloud synchronization

recommendations.recommendation: Create a version catalog (gradle/libs.versions.toml) to centralize plugin and dependency versions
recommendations.rationale: Improves maintainability and makes version coordination more explicit

recommendations.recommendation: Ensure local.properties is in .gitignore with a template local.properties.template file
recommendations.rationale: Prevents hardcoded SDK paths from being committed; enables easier project setup for team members
